features.featureTitle: When the user clicks the profile icon in HubTopBar, if the user does not have an existing profile, guide them through the account creation flow (Internet Identity authentication + Google Sign-In for Gmail linking + profile details form) before granting access to the profile view. Only after a profile is successfully created or confirmed to exist should the dashboard be displayed.

Add a user dashboard section within ProfileView that displays the following stat cards for the authenticated user: (1) Tasks Completed — total number of tasks the user has completed as a performer, (2) User Rating — the user's average star rating received from task creators, (3) Total Ratings — the total number of rating reviews the user has received, and (4) Tasks Posted — total number of tasks the user has created. Fetch this data from the user's backend Profile record.
